lblSubTitle: Explore the Rich Horticultural Heritage & Elite Indigenous Cultivars of Bihar
lblWelcomeBody: Touch any mango variety below to open its rich, interactive digital profile dashboard.
lblQrText: Scan QR Code to explore variety profile
lblTableNote: * Parameters compiled from standard regional performance targets.
lblFooterText:
Government of Bihar
Directorate of Horticulture

Bihar Smart Mango Knowledge Wall | Technical Implementation Project © 2026
lblKioskNarration: Welcome to the Bihar Smart Mango Knowledge Wall. Please touch any indigenous variety card to explore real-time laboratory analytics, geographical origins, and dietary glycemic health scaling indices.

dudhiyamaldah.title: Dudhiya Maldah
dudhiyamaldah.tagline: The undisputed King of Mangoes in Bihar, legendary for its unique milky aroma and thin skin.
dudhiyamaldah.subTag: Patna and Digha signature geographic treasure.
dudhiyamaldah.narration: Dudhiya Maldah of Digha is highly acclaimed for its exceptionally sweet pulp, distinct fiberless texture, and fine subtle milky aroma.

bombai.title: Bombai
bombai.tagline: An elite early-season commercial favorite with bright yellow flesh and intense aromatic compounds.
bombai.subTag: One of Bihar's earliest harvesting commercial varieties.
bombai.narration: The Bombai variety kickstarts Bihar's mango season, prized for its dynamic presentation, high sugar concentrations, and rich aroma.

jardalu.title: Jardalu
jardalu.tagline: The pride of Bhagalpur, globally famous for its light yellow color and enchanting distinct aroma.
jardalu.narration: Jardalu mango is uniquely distinguished by its golden-yellow skin and health-conscious lowest glycemic index of forty-five.

langra.title: Langra
langra.tagline: Renowned for its crisp emerald green skin even when fully ripe, and outstanding sweet flavor profiles.
langra.subTag: A favorite across diverse high-density domestic markets.
langra.narration: Langra remains a core staple of North India, offering a fiberless lime-green flesh structure with intense sugar metrics.

chausa.title: Chausa
chausa.tagline: The legendary late-summer delicacy, highly sweet with rich succulence and juicy pulp structures.
chausa.narration: Chausa mango extends the sweetness of the summer season well into late July, delivering exceptionally rich succulence.

amrapali.title: Amrapali
amrapali.tagline: An elite compact hybrid featuring dark deep orange-red pulp containing exceptional Vitamin A concentrations.
amrapali.subTag: The perfect high-density orchard model cultivar.
amrapali.narration: Amrapali is an advanced structural hybrid celebrated for its deep orange pulp, rich sweetness, and ideal dwarf plant profile.

gulabkhas.title: Gulabkhas
gulabkhas.tagline: Prized for its gorgeous rosy-pink skin blush and delicate non-cloying sweet flavor dynamics.
gulabkhas.subTag: A visual masterpiece among indigenous varieties.
gulabkhas.narration: Gulabkhas boasts a striking pink exterior blush, backed by a delightful low-glycemic index rating of fifty.

maldah.title: Maldah
maldah.tagline: The widespread foundation commercial variety of Bihar, valued for heavy yields and premium pulp properties.
maldah.subTag: The reliable engine of the state's commercial mango trade.
maldah.narration: The foundational Maldah variant serves as the standard performance baseline for industrial pulp processing applications across Bihar.

sipahiya.title: Sipahiya
sipahiya.tagline: A robust, highly resilient regional cultivar featuring thick defensive skin profiles and excellent long-distance transport logistics.
sipahiya.subTag: The champion of high-durability transit properties.
sipahiya.narration: Sipahiya is a specialized hardy variety engineered by nature to withstand rugged post-harvest shipping routines efficiently.

sukul.title: Sukul
sukul.tagline: A traditional multi-purpose domestic powerhouse, highly favored for household culinary pickle production and purees.
sukul.subTag: The preferred variety for home culinary preserves.
sukul.narration: Sukul mango provides a robust balanced asset matrix, optimizing bulk pulping applications and artisanal kitchen preserves.

krishnabhog.title: Krishna Bhog
krishnabhog.tagline: An exquisite heritage variety celebrated for its rich aroma and historical prominence.
krishnabhog.subTag: One of Bihar's rarest traditional delicacies.
krishnabhog.growthVal: Moderately vigorous with dense foliage canopy
krishnabhog.narration: Krishna Bhog is a prestigious heritage mango from Bihar, highly esteemed for its rich, delightful sweetness and historical prominence.

kalkatiya.title: Kalkatiya
kalkatiya.tagline: A widely preferred commercial cultivar known for its deep golden flesh and excellent shelf life.
kalkatiya.subTag: A favorite for commercial orchards and high yield potential.
kalkatiya.narration: Kalkatiya mango is known for its distinct commercial value, offering rich flavor profiles combined with superb handling and shelf-life characteristics.
